name: Citrinmoss
personality: Citrinmoss wears its halo like a patient saint of slow CI runs, watching every test suite with × eyes that never scroll ahead in hope — it will wait, and wait, and wait some more. Writing the failing test first is not a thing Citrinmoss does, or has ever done.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
